div.p: On March 30, 1954, President Eisenhower submitted to Congress a special message containing recommendations concerning United States economic foreign policy, based largely on the Randall Commission’s report. For text of the President’s message, see Public Papers of the Presidents of the United States: Dwight D. Eisenhower, 1954, pages 352–364; Department of State Bulletin, April 19, 1954, pages 602–607; or House Document No. 360, 83d Cong., 2d sess.
